tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, indicating impaired glucose regulation or possible diabetes, despite a low fasting glucose, which may suggest recent hypoglycemia or dietary factors. Renal function, electrolytes, and calcium are within normal limits. Mildly decreased total CO₂ may indicate a tendency toward metabolic acidosis. Clinical correlation is recommended.

display.value: Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
